name: sort
description: Sort and process files in any folder with dispatchers for videos, images, documents, archives, and installers.

interface.shortDescription: Classify and route messy folders into an AI Library.
interface.longDescription: Dispatches files by type, runs the right processing pipeline, and moves results into a structured AI Library with user-overridable routing rules.
defaultPrompt: Sort the files in this folder into an AI Library.
Add a routing rule for invoices and shipping labels.
Explain why this file matched the wrong sort rule.
